name: Ego-Robot
caption: The autonomous agent navigating the environment. It is currently positioned in the center of Room 0, equipped with a 360-degree LiDAR and panoramic vision system for real-time spatial reasoning.

name: chair
caption: A modern ergonomic office chair upholstered in dark fabric. It features a high backrest, adjustable armrests, and a sturdy five-star base with rolling casters for easy movement on the office floor.

name: table

instruction: Find the rectangular wooden dining table featuring a polished oak surface and four thick tapered legs.
